---
title: "Publications"
---

## Peer-reviewed publications

1. Carolyn Kroger, Coauthor Name, and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of the Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)

2. Carolyn Kroger and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of Another Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)
   
1. Carolyn Kroger, Coauthor Name, and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of the Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)

2. Carolyn Kroger and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of Another Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)

1. Carolyn Kroger, Coauthor Name, and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of the Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)

2. Carolyn Kroger and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of Another Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)

1. Carolyn Kroger, Coauthor Name, and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of the Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)



## Preprints

1. Carolyn Kroger and Coauthor Name. Year.  
   "Title of Another Article." *Journal Name* volume(issue): pages.  
   [DOI](https://doi.org/your-doi-here) | [PDF](files/paper-example.pdf)
